name: ated-360
description: Plateforme ATED-360 — frontend React + backend Express, servis par un seul serveur.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c green,cyan "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.db:setup: npm run prisma:migrate --prefix server && npm run db:seed --prefix server
scripts.render-build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && npm run prisma:generate --prefix server && npm run prisma:push --prefix server && npm run db:seed --prefix server
